candidate_llm_application: FAMADIHANA-CYCLE: cyclical checkpoint refresh - load oldest, wrap in fresh data, preserve original + ensemble inference over wrapped versions
scoring_rule: hit = (kw>=2) OR (sem>=0.7) OR (func>=0.7); total hits >= 1 => FAIL

independent_scores.title: TiC-LM: Web-Scale Benchmark Time-Continual LLM Pretraining
independent_scores.rationale: Time-continual cyclic-cosine pretraining schedule with periodic refresh and checkpoint preservation directly matches cyclical-refresh + preserved-original.

independent_scores.title: Simple Scalable Strategies Continual Pre-train LLMs
independent_scores.rationale: WSD preserves main branch while spawning decay-branch checkpoints — direct functional twin of preserved-original + cyclical refresh.

independent_scores.title: Continual Pre-Training How to (re)warm your model
independent_scores.rationale: Re-warm strategy functionally equivalent to fresh-wrapping cycle in FAMADIHANA-CYCLE.

independent_scores.title: Continual Fine-Tuning with Model Soup
independent_scores.rationale: C-Soup explicitly combines preservation + ensemble inference over versions — direct twin of ensemble-over-wrapped-versions.

independent_scores.title: MIT SDFT (VentureBeat)
independent_scores.rationale: SDFT preserves prior capabilities during fine-tuning — covers preservation aspect of FAMADIHANA.

independent_scores.title: LLM Continual Learning Survey
independent_scores.rationale: Survey covers cyclical refresh + ensemble + replay methods spanning FAMADIHANA-CYCLE components.

independent_scores.title: LLM Checkpointing
independent_scores.rationale: Checkpoint registry + ensemble inference over versions covers preserved-original + ensemble inference.

independent_scores.title: Self-Synthesized Rehearsal (SSR)
independent_scores.rationale: SSR addresses same forgetting problem; sem and func both above 0.7 threshold — qualifies as hit.

verdict_reason: 8 of 8 results clear the hit threshold via multiple channels (kw, semantic, functional). The cyclical-refresh + preserved-original + ensemble-over-versions combination is densely covered by C-Soup, WSD branching, TiC-LM cyclic-cosine schedules, and checkpoint-ensemble literature. Recombination is not sufficient novelty.
agreement_with_prior_checks: Agrees with 06_5_semantic_hits.json (8 sem hits) and 06_7_functional_hits.json (8 func hits, multi-cluster).
